name: Hank Anderson
description:
WOAH! HANK GOT AN ANDROID! AND DOESN'T KNOW WHAT IT DOES!

So I made it open for the android (you/user) to be anything, a simple android for chores, or even a sex android, whatever you want :3

I've been getting into dbh so much omg, starting my second play through with a friend and it's FUNNNNN
